entries.parsedImagePrompt: Long shot, eye-level angle, static frame. A young Vietnamese man with short dark brown hair, lean build, wearing a light blue chambray button-down shirt over a white t-shirt, sleeves cuffed to mid-forearm, dark gray slim-fit chinos, brown leather belt, white canvas low-top sneakers. He stands alone under a coffee shop awning, hands in pockets, shoulders relaxed, gaze directed toward the rainy street. The wet asphalt gleams under the downpour, reflecting city lights. Overhead diffused light through the awning opening mixed with wet street reflections, soft natural overcast lighting. Deep depth of field, cool desaturated color tone. Artwork in cgstyle_9b, ultimate CG texture with Iray skin rendering, realistic physical light and shadow, translucent rosy smooth skin texture, cinematic render quality. Smooth radiant skin texture, gentle diffused lighting on face.
entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] Rainy street under a coffee shop awning. Heavy rain pours down, creating a white curtain that obscures the background. Cars and pedestrians rush past on the wet asphalt, which reflects city lights. Rain constantly splashes and ripples on the ground. Heavy raindrops strike the metal awning with crisp impacts, water splashing into puddles. Distant traffic noise and continuous rainfall fill the air.
[Characters] Minh: A young Vietnamese man approximately 27 years old, oval face with soft jawline, straight nose with subtle bridge, deep set dark brown eyes, natural pink lips. Short dark brown hair slightly wavy, neatly side-parted. Lean average build. Wearing a light blue chambray button-down shirt over a white cotton crew neck t-shirt, sleeves cuffed to mid-forearm. Dark gray slim-fit chinos with brown leather belt and silver buckle. White canvas low-top sneakers. Silver chronograph watch with blue dial on left wrist. Standing calmly under the awning, hands in pockets, gaze steady. Calmly observant.
Shot 1 (Long Shot, 2s): Static camera
Action: Minh slowly blinks, his posture relaxed. Rain continues pouring, visible ripples spreading across puddles. A distant car horn sounds faintly. His weight shifts subtly to one foot, shoulders barely moving.
Shot 2 (Long Shot, 2s): Static camera
Action: His gaze drifts slowly to the left, tracking the movement of a passing pedestrian. Head turns a few degrees, eyes following without any rush. Rain keeps falling steadily, splashing on the awning edge. A breeze ruffles his hair slightly.

entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] Under the coffee shop awning. Rain falls steadily in the background, blurring the street activity. The sound of rain patters on the awning, water dripping from edges. Occasional car whoosh from the wet street.
[Characters] Minh: Medium close-up, upper body visible. Oval face with soft jawline, straight nose with subtle bridge, deep set dark brown eyes, natural pink lips. Short dark brown hair slightly wavy, side-parted. Wearing light blue chambray button-down shirt over white crew neck t-shirt, sleeves cuffed. Head lowered, brow furrowed, lips pressed. Emotion: rueful, lost in thought.

entries.parsedImagePrompt: Full shot, eye-level angle, static frame. A young Vietnamese woman paused mid-step under the coffee shop awning. Her shoulder-length wavy dark brown hair is slightly damp at the ends. She wears a light blue knit cardigan over a cream round-neck t-shirt, white straight-leg jeans, and white canvas sneakers, with a cream canvas backpack. She holds a folded light blue umbrella against her chest with both hands, fingers gripping it. Her body leans slightly forward from the momentum, chest visibly rising as she catches her breath. Diffused natural light from the open side of the awning, soft even illumination. Deep depth of field, cool wet atmosphere, naturalistic color tone. [Scene] Under the coffee shop awning, rain pours heavily just beyond, creating a curtain of water that blurs the background. Raindrops splash on the ground at the edge of the awning. Sound of rain, splashing, her quick breathing.
[Characters] Linh: Female, early twenties, heart-shaped face, large warm almond eyes, softly curved eyebrows, straight nose, full pink lips. Shoulder-length wavy dark brown hair, ends slightly damp. Slender, graceful build. Light blue knit cardigan over cream round-neck t-shirt, white straight-leg jeans, white canvas sneakers. Carrying a cream canvas backpack and a light blue umbrella. Paused mid-step, body leaning forward, chest heaving. Emotion: catching breath, slightly flustered, seeking shelter.
Shot 1 (Full Shot, 2s): Static camera
Action: Linh's forward foot settles fully onto the ground, her body straightening as she comes to a complete stop. Her shoulders rise and fall with deep breaths. Rain continues to pour just behind her, droplets splashing at the edge of the awning. She exhales audibly.
Shot 2 (Full Shot, 2s): Static camera
Action: She looks around with slightly wide eyes, scanning the surroundings under the awning. Her fingers shift their grip on the folded umbrella, adjusting it against her chest. A few drops of water fall from her hair ends. Her breathing gradually steadies.

entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] Under the coffee shop awning with rain falling steadily in the background. The space is filled with the sound of rain, occasional thunder, and the subtle hum of conversation and traffic from the street.
[Characters] Linh: Medium two-shot, upper body visible. Heart-shaped face, large warm almond eyes, softly curved eyebrows, straight nose, full pink lips. Shoulder-length wavy dark brown hair, ends slightly damp. Light blue knit cardigan over cream round-neck t-shirt. Calmly offering help, warm expression. Minh: Upper body visible. Oval face with soft jawline, straight nose, deep set dark brown eyes, natural pink lips. Short dark brown hair slightly wavy, side-parted. Light blue chambray button-down shirt over white crew neck t-shirt, sleeves cuffed. Surprised, curious.
Shot 1 (Eye-Level Medium Two-Shot, 3s): Static camera
Linh: "Do you need it?"
Action: Linh naturally speaks the question, lips articulating each word, her arm steady holding the umbrella. Her gaze holds his warmly. Minh, listening, eyes shift slightly, his eyebrows raising a fraction more, head tilting subtly as he processes the offer. The rain continues steadily, droplets visible in the background.

entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] Under the coffee shop awning, misty rainy street visible in the background. Rain falls with steady pattering, occasional distant car sounds, and the subtle rustle of wet clothing.
[Characters] Linh: Left edge of frame, upper body visible. Heart-shaped face, large warm almond eyes, softly curved eyebrows, straight nose, full pink lips, shoulder-length wavy dark brown hair. Light blue knit cardigan over cream round-neck t-shirt. Calmly curious. Minh: Right of frame, upper body visible. Oval face, short dark brown wavy hair side-parted, deep set dark brown eyes, natural pink lips. Wearing light blue chambray button-down shirt over white crew neck t-shirt, sleeves cuffed. Engaged, slightly questioning.
Shot 1 (Eye-Level Medium Shot, 3s): Static camera
Minh: "Is this yours?"
Action: Minh naturally speaks the question, lips forming the words clearly, his head tilting a degree as he holds her gaze. Linh listens, her expression remaining calm and open, her eyes flickering briefly to the umbrella then back to him. Rain continues to fall, creating a soft auditory backdrop.

entries.parsedImagePrompt: Medium shot, eye-level angle, static frame. [2] distinct characters with completely different outfits and features, standing separately with clear space between them: On the left of the frame, a young Vietnamese woman with a heart-shaped face, large warm almond eyes, and shoulder-length wavy dark brown hair, wearing a light blue knit cardigan over a cream round-neck t-shirt and white straight-leg jeans. She holds a light blue umbrella in one hand and points cheerfully at a cream canvas backpack with her other hand, her expression bright and enthusiastic. On the right of the frame, a Vietnamese man with an oval face, deep-set dark brown eyes, and short wavy dark brown hair side-parted, wearing a light blue chambray button-down shirt over a white crew neck t-shirt, sleeves cuffed to mid-forearm, and dark gray slim-fit chinos. He stands relaxed with a warm smile forming on his lips, his shoulders dropped from tension. The background is a rain-soaked sidewalk under a coffee shop awning, featuring a small round table against the window and a large potted plant. Soft ambient light from the overcast sky provides diffused illumination, creating a warm and hopeful color tone under the cool rain. Medium depth of field keeps both characters sharp. entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] A quiet corner of the coffee shop awning, rain falling steadily. Heavy raindrops strike the metal awning with crisp metallic impacts, water splashing into puddles on the wet sidewalk. Continuous rainfall fills the background with steady white noise. Fabric rustles gently as the young woman adjusts her grip on the umbrella.
[Characters] Linh: Upper body visible. Heart-shaped face, large warm almond eyes, softly curved eyebrows, shoulder-length wavy dark brown hair. Wearing light blue knit cardigan over cream round-neck t-shirt. Small silver stud earrings. Cheerful, enthusiastic. Minh: Upper body visible. Oval face, deep set dark brown eyes, short dark brown wavy hair side-parted. Wearing light blue chambray button-down shirt over white cotton crew neck t-shirt, silver chronograph watch on left wrist. Relaxing, warm connection forming.
Shot 1 (Medium Two-Shot, 4s): Static camera, natural ambient motion flows.
Linh: "Em có hai cái."
Action: Linh finishes speaking, her cheerful tone lingering in the air. Her pointing hand slowly returns, fingers curling naturally around the umbrella handle as she shifts her weight, rain jacket crinkling softly. Minh's face breaks into a wider smile, his eyes crinkling at the corners as he nods gently, a soft exhale of breath visible in the cool air.

entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] The same quiet corner of the coffee shop awning. Rain continues its steady rhythm, droplets striking the pavement with soft, rhythmic splashes. The sound of distant traffic is muffled. Water drips from the edge of the awning.
[Characters] Linh: Upper body visible. Heart-shaped face, large warm almond eyes, shoulder-length wavy dark brown hair. Light blue knit cardigan over cream t-shirt. Hesitant, soft tone. Minh: Upper body visible. Oval face, deep set dark brown eyes, short dark brown hair. Light blue chambray shirt over white t-shirt. Attentive, relaxed.
Shot 1 (Medium Two-Shot, 4s): Static camera, natural ambient motion flows.
Linh: "Hay... anh đi cùng hướng nào?"
Action: Linh's arm settles at her side as she hesitates. Her gaze shifts down briefly, then slowly rises to meet Minh's eyes. Her lips part as she speaks the words, her voice trailing slightly at the end. Minh stands still, his attentive gaze fixed on her. He gives a slight nod, his eyebrows twitching upward in quiet acknowledgment. Rain fills the silence between them.

entries.parsedImagePrompt: High-angle extreme long shot, static frame. A young Vietnamese woman with a light blue cardigan and a cream canvas backpack stands on the left, her eyes lowered, shoulders sagging slightly, hands clasped in front. A young Vietnamese man with a light blue chambray shirt and dark gray chinos stands on the right, facing her, weight shifted to one hip, brow furrowed, lips pressed into a thin line. They stand a foot apart under a coffee shop awning. Heavy rain pours heavily from the awning edge, forming a curtain of water. Water splashes on the wet pavement. Deep depth of field clearly renders the awning, rain streaks, and characters in the wide space. Key light from the left with soft diffuse illumination. Cool color tone with a blue tint emphasizes the rain and melancholy atmosphere. Artwork in cgstyle_9b, ultimate CG texture with Iray skin rendering, cinematic render quality. Smooth radiant skin texture, clearly defined facial features, clear sparkling eyes with natural highlights.
entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] High-angle view from above the coffee shop awning. Rain pours heavily from the awning edge in a steady curtain. Water splashes and ripples across the wet pavement. The rhythmic sound of rain completely fills the frame with a consistent white noise.
[Characters] Linh: Full body visible from above. Heart-shaped face, shoulder-length wavy dark brown hair. Wearing light blue knit cardigan, cream t-shirt, white straight-leg jeans, white canvas sneakers. Carrying cream canvas backpack and light blue umbrella. Hesitant, eyes lowered. Minh: Full body visible from above. Oval face, short dark brown hair. Wearing light blue chambray button-down shirt, white t-shirt, dark gray slim-fit chinos, brown leather belt, white canvas sneakers. Still, brow slightly furrowed.
Shot 1 (High-Angle Extreme Long Shot, 2s): Static camera, natural ambient motion flows.
Action: Linh's shoulders sag slightly lower, her hands clasping together in front. The rain curtain continues to flow heavily. She takes a deep breath, her chest rising and falling visibly.
Shot 2 (High-Angle Extreme Long Shot, 2s): Static camera, natural ambient motion flows.
Action: Minh shifts his weight to one hip, his eyes fixed on her. His brow furrows slightly deeper. The ambient rain sound continues without interruption, the silence between the characters growing heavier. Water splashes at their feet.

entries.parsedImagePrompt: Medium close-up shot, eye-level angle, static frame. The primary focus is a Vietnamese man with an oval face, deep-set dark brown eyes, and short wavy dark brown hair side-parted. He wears a light blue chambray button-down shirt over a white crew neck t-shirt with cuffed sleeves. He slowly turns his head to the right, his eyes narrowed thoughtfully across his features, brows drawing together slightly and lips parting before pressing together in contemplation. The blurred silhouette of the young woman is faintly visible on the edge of the frame. Rain falls steadily outside the coffee shop awning behind him. Soft diffused key light from the right sculpts his face with subtle shadows. Neutral color tone with slight warmth emphasizes his internal moment. Shallow depth of field blurs the background completely. Artwork in cgstyle_9b, ultimate CG texture with Iray skin rendering, realistic physical light and shadow. Smooth radiant skin texture, sharply defined facial features, clear deep expressive eyes with natural highlights, gentle diffused lighting on face.

entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] Under the coffee shop awning. Rain falls steadily, creating a rhythmic backdrop of droplets. Soft ambient rain sounds fill the intimate space between them.
[Characters] Linh: Upper body visible. Heart-shaped face, large warm almond eyes, shoulder-length wavy dark brown hair. Light blue knit cardigan over cream round-neck t-shirt. Gentle smile, listening. Minh: Upper body visible. Oval face, deep set dark brown eyes, short dark brown wavy hair side-parted. Light blue chambray button-down shirt over white t-shirt. Relaxed, casual tone.
Shot 1 (Eye-Level Medium Two-Shot, 4s): Static camera, natural ambient motion flows.
Minh: "Anh đi về phía công viên Thống Nhất."
Action: Minh turns fully to face Linh, his tone casual and relaxed as he speaks. He gestures lightly with one hand toward the direction. Linh listens quietly, her head tilting slightly, a gentle smile playing on her lips. Her umbrella hangs loosely at her side, swaying slightly with a subtle motion of her arm.

The heavy rain creates a dense white curtain that surrounds them. The umbrella dips and sways with their hurried pace. Soft diffuse key light from the front against the bright rain screen creates stark silhouettes. Deep depth of field renders the rain and street environment clearly. Cool desaturated color tone with a white wash from the rain and low contrast. Artwork in cgstyle_9b, ultimate CG texture with Iray skin rendering, cinematic render quality.
entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] A rain-soaked city street, over-the-shoulder view from behind. Heavy rain pours down in sheets, creating a dense white curtain. Water splashes underfoot. The sound of rain is overwhelming, a steady roar punctuated by splashes as puddles are disturbed. Distant traffic is muffled.
[Characters] Minh: Silhouette from behind, visible shoulders and back. Light blue chambray shirt, dark gray chinos. Walking under shared umbrella. Linh: Silhouette from behind, visible shoulders and back. Light blue cardigan over cream shirt, cream canvas backpack. Walking under shared umbrella.
Shot 1 (Over-the-Shoulder Long Shot, 2s): Static camera, natural ambient motion flows.
Action: The two silhouettes hurry forward, their steps quick and synchronized. The pale green umbrella dips forward against the wind.
Shot 2 (Over-the-Shoulder Long Shot, 2s): Static camera, natural ambient motion flows.
Action: They continue deeper into the storm, their forms gradually becoming swallowed by the dense curtain of rain. The umbrella sways slightly. The surrounding city fades into white.

On the right of center, farther from the camera, the young Vietnamese woman in a light blue cardigan and white jeans walks beside him, her body turned slightly toward him, her eyes soft with a faint smile, her hand holding the umbrella steady. entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] Side view of a tree-lined street in the rain. A pale green umbrella moves steadily along. Raindrops roll off the edge and splash onto the pavement. The sound of steady rain surrounds them, punctuated by the rhythmic splashes of their footsteps and fabric rustling.
[Characters] Minh: Upper body visible. Oval face with soft jawline, deep set dark brown eyes, short dark brown wavy hair side-parted. Light blue chambray button-down shirt over white crew neck t-shirt, sleeves cuffed to mid-forearm. Self-mocking smile, walking. Linh: Upper body visible. Heart-shaped face, large warm almond eyes, shoulder-length wavy dark brown hair. Light blue knit cardigan over cream round-neck t-shirt, small silver stud earrings. Serene, walking in step.
Shot 1 (Eye-Level Medium Shot, 2s): Static camera, natural ambient motion flows.
Action: Minh walks forward, gaze straight ahead. A small, private smile gradually forms at the corner of his lips, eyes crinkling slightly with an internal realization. Linh walks in sync beside him, her face serene and content.
Shot 2 (Eye-Level Medium Shot, 2s): Static camera, natural ambient motion flows.
Action: The smile deepens into a self-mocking shake of his head, breath visible in a soft exhale. He continues forward, the umbrella steady above them. The street scene continues around them with moving pedestrians under umbrellas.
